detectors.description: solc-0.6.12 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.6.12 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.6.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- ^0.6.12 (tamasutra.sol#27)
